Prove-Up Hearing (Asbestos) As To Defendant Western Macarthur
Off Calendar Feb-20-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Uncontested Calendar of FEB-20-2002 ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Prove-Up Hearing (Asbestos) Appearance: Anthony Vieira, Esq. of Brayton-Purcell, 415/898-1555 on behalf of plaintiff(s). No appearance on behalf of Western MacArthur. Request for judgment in favor of the plaintiff(s) Estate of decedent HARLEY DERRIS in the sum of $101,710.00; AUGUSTA FERRIS in the sum of $800,000.00; JACK FERRIS $100,000.00 & GARY FERRIS in the sum of $100,000.00 plus costs and interest as provided by law, in an amount to be determined later by the Court and against defendant WESTERN MacARTHUR was made. The Court took matter Under Submission as of Feb-20-2002 by ALFRED G. CHIANTELLI. JUDGE CHIANTELLI; CLERK: V. MU; REPORTER: C. KAREN, #8189 (503)
